programme.title: Herbert Blomstedt & Gewandhausorchester Leipzig
programme.sub-title: Symphonies in D by Mozart and Voríšek
programme.desc: Conductor Herbert Blomstedt and the Gewandhausorchester take us on a musical journey to the Czech Republic in this 2020 concert from Leipzig's Gewandhaus. The program opens with Bohemian composer Jan Václav Hugo Voríšek's Symphony in D major, Op. 23 (1821). Although the composition – Voríšek's only symphony – was never performed during the composer's lifetime, it has become one of his most-performed works today. Also on the program is Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart's Symphony No. 38 in D major, K. 504. This work, which premiered while Mozart was visiting Prague in 1787, is often referred to as the ‘Prague Symphony'.

programme.title: Seong-Jin Cho
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Ivan Fischer, Budapest Festival Orchestra & Richard Goode
programme.sub-title: Beethoven - Symphonies and Piano Concerto No. 4
programme.desc: Iván Fischer leads his Budapest Festival Orchestra (BFO) in a concert program dedicated to the music of Ludwig van Beethoven. The program opens with the composer's Symphony No. 1 in C major, Op. 21. Afterward, Fischer conducts Beethoven's Piano Concerto No. 4 in G major, Op. 58, in which Richard Goode features as the soloist. The acclaimed American pianist (1943) is known for his interpretations of the Beethoven repertoire. Goode recorded all five Beethoven piano concertos with the BFO and Fischer, earning him exceptional critical acclaim and a Grammy Award nomination. As an encore, Goode performs the Sarabande from J. S. Bach's Partita in B-flat major, BWV 825. The program closes with Beethoven's famous Symphony No. 5 in C minor, Op. 67. This performance was recorded at the Béla Bartók National Concert Hall in Budapest, Hungary, on January 29, 2017.

programme.title: Les Dissonances
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Quatuor Ebène
programme.desc: Renowned French string quartet Quatuor Ébène marked the 250th birth anniversary of Ludwig van Beethoven (1770-1827) with a remarkable project: recording all of the great composer's sixteen string quartets. For five years, violinists Pierre Colombet and Gabriel Le Magadure, violist Marie Chilemme, and cellist Raphaël Merlin immersed themselves in Beethoven's 650 pages of sheet music. Their efforts culminated in the performance of the composer's complete repertoire for string quartet, which covers three decades of Beethoven's musical creativity, during six impressive concerts at Philharmonie de Paris in the autumn of 2020. Quatuor Ébène explored every facet of Beethoven's string quartet repertoire: from the youthful Opus 18 string quartets to the Razumovsky, Harp, and Serioso quartets (Opus 59, 74, and 95) from his middle period, and finally, the depth of his late quartets (Opus 127 to 135). This program features Quatuor Ébène performing Beethoven's String Quartet No. 1 in F major, Op. 18, No. 1 String Quartet No. 10 in E-flat major, Op. 74, "Harp" and String Quartet No. 9 in C major, Op. 59, No. 3, "Razumovsky". This concert performance was recorded at Philharmonie de Paris on October 13, 2020.

programme.title: Martha Argerich, Evgeny Kissin, Theodosia Ntokou & Cristina Marton-Argerich
programme.sub-title: Martha Argerich – A Birthday Celebration - II
programme.desc: On the occasion of her 80th birthday, Argentinian pianist Martha Argerich explored repertoire for piano and violin in this wonderful concert, recorded at Château de Chantilly, France. The ‘Grande Dame' of the piano is joined by various renowned artists, including pianists Evgeny Kissin, Theodosia Ntokou, and Cristina Marton-Argerich, and violinist Maxim Vengerov. On the program are Dmitri Shostakovich's Concertino for two pianos, Op. 94 Frédéric Chopin's Impromptu No. 3, Op. 51, Polonaise No. 6, Op. 53 “Heroic”, and Waltz No. 6, Op. 64 No. 1 Camille Saint-Saëns's Polonaise for two pianos, Op. 77 César Franck's Sonata for violin and piano in A major and Fritz Kreisler's Liebesleid and Schön Rosmarin. This performance was recorded on June 12, 2021.

programme.title: Václav Luks & Collegium 1704
programme.desc: J. S. Bach's six Brandenburg Concerto's belong to his best-known works. The composer wrote these concertos between 1711 and 1720 and dedicated them in 1721 to Christian Ludwig, Margrave of Brandenburg. In celebration of the pieces' 300th anniversary, Czech harpsichordist and conductor Václav Luks and the renowned Baroque ensemble Collegium 1704 recorded all six Brandenburg Concertos on historical instruments in 2021. The concertos are based on the Italian concerto grosso form, in which a group of solo instruments is set against a large ensemble. Bach's Brandenburg Concertos feature remarkable combinations of solo instruments and virtuoso solos. This performance was recorded at the Hall of Mirrors in the Köthen Castle, Germany.

programme.title: Una Navidad Feliz

programme.title: Amigos Por Correspondencia

programme.title: Una pizca de amor
programme.desc: Cuando una aspirante a chef consigue un trabajo de asistente en el restaurante de su ídolo, está convencida de que su gran oportunidad está mas cerca que nunca. Tras un difícil comienzo, se hace amiga del atractivo chef ejecutivo y comienzan a desarrollar lazos emocionales en la cocina.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: Willie se apura a completar sus cazas antes de que su comprador cierre al final del día por el resto de la temporada. Troy coloca más cuerdas que nunca y los Landry tratan de ganarle al tiempo. Daniel tiene problemas. Jay Paul caza junto a su casa.

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: Dwaine llega a su límite. Willie se da cuenta de que está perdiendo dinero. Kristi caza junto con su hijo. A Glenn se le hace realidad un sueño que había tenido durante toda su vida.

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: Troy confía en un amuleto de la familia Landry, mientras que Chase y Holden no dejan nada a la suerte. Jay Paul y Tommy van tras Houdini, un cocodrilo muy hábil para escaparse. Kristi lucha contra cocodrilos que invaden su territorio.

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: Daniel y Dwaine tratan de hacer las paces. RJ y Jay Paul se pelean. Jacob molesta a Troy. Glenn busca la manera de pagarle a un amigo.

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: A Bruce le avisan que su comprador va a cerrar más pronto de lo que él quisiera. Troy ordena que solo atrapen a los cocodrilos grandes. Joey y Dorien se quedan varados. Frenchy y Gee comienzan un segundo empleo para ganar más dinero.

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: Chase recibe una cucharada de su propio chocolate. Daniel hace un gran descubrimiento. Frenchy y Gee luchan contra un caníbal. Glenn comienza un nuevo negocio.

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: Troy enfrenta a Chase, criticándolo por su obsesión de dispararle a los cocodrilos. Joey persigue a su "ballena blanca". El comprador de Willie amenaza con cerrar antes de tiempo. Frenchy y Gee intentan cazar grandes bestias que les den mucho dinero.

programme.title: El Barón
programme.desc: Nacho exige un porcentaje a cambio de elevar la producción en el laboratorio a tonelada y media de cocaína mensual. Escobar desplaza al Alacrán y el Barón asume las riendas.

programme.title: El Barón
programme.desc: Nacho mejora el laboratorio para elevar la producción de cocaína, pero el enemigo está cerca y pone en peligro la vida de Isabel. Judy se une a Pacho Herrera, líder del cártel de Cali.

programme.title: El Barón
programme.sub-title: Más que el poder de la cocaína
programme.desc: El control de las instituciones permite manejar las leyes y, con ese poder, Nacho y Escobar planean impulsar, aún más, el negocio de la cocaína.

programme.title: El Barón
programme.desc: Una junta de alto nivel en Armenia conduce a Nacho hasta la Posada Alemana, donde aparece Cecilia y él se derrite por ella. Los narcos aprueban la idea de entrar al círculo de la política.

programme.title: El Barón
programme.desc: Para importar acetona, Nacho necesita una compañía que lo represente y un empresario reconocido que no levante sospechas.

programme.title: El Barón
programme.desc: El Alacrán exige dinero a cambio de la vida del coronel Gerónimo Montero. Nacho no quiere pagar un centavo por el rescate de su padre. Judy recluta mujeres para el Pacho Herrera.

programme.title: El Barón
programme.desc: Aunque sabe que no es la mejor estrategia, Nacho busca al padre Miguel para que le dé pistas de los secuestradores. Isabel ruega que convenza a Nacho y pague por el rescate.

programme.title: El Barón
programme.desc: Aunque es una contradicción para él, Nacho accede a pagar por el rescate de su padre. Miguel, el sacerdote, es el mediador. El Alacrán se sale con la suya.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: Rosa está harta de Bárbara y le suelta una bomba de la que quizá se arrepienta, pero Andrea se confiesa y se le ocurre una manera que puede ayudar a Eva Sotomayor a confirmar su identidad.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: José Ignacio no entiende la acusación de Bárbara, por lo que va a pedirle explicaciones a Rosa. Ella intenta recoger el agua derramada. Margaret descubre a Rosaura descuidada y la deja en evidencia.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: Eduardito tiene fiebre, está mal y José Ignacio reacciona bien. Él y Rosa llevan al niño al hospital, y Bárbara los consigue abrazados. El plan de sabotaje de Acua a Venus da un giro perturbador.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: Andrea acompaña a la clínica a Rosa, todos están pendientes de la identidad de Eva. Margaret le impone a Rosaura que Ramón sea su chofer. José Ignacio siente un vínculo especial con Eduardito.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.sub-title: Con el corazón en la mano
programme.desc: José Ignacio se cansa de luchar en contra de sus sentimientos, y Rosa le comparte los suyos. Bárbara encuentra aliados en los dos Gerardo Altamirano. El pasado de Raquel está al acecho.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: Rosa está lista para el lanzamiento de la nueva colección de Venus, pero Rodolfo quiere más tiempo. El cerco a Raquel, y también a Rosaura, se estrecha, la verdad quiere salir a la luz.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: José Ignacio no puede sacarse a Eva de la cabeza, Junior se las juega para conquistarla. Rosa solo piensa en Eduardo. A pesar de ciertas dudas, Rodolfo pone en marcha el sabotaje a Venus.

programme.title: El Amor Frente al Poder
programme.desc: El Amor Frente al Poder - Nosotros Somos Los Ricos: Zeyit continúa preocupado por Rüveyda. Ali intenta ayudarla a escapar, pero su padre lo descrubre y lo expone frente al resto de la familia.

programme.title: El Amor Frente al Poder
programme.desc: El Amor Frente al Poder - Buscando Un Trato: Zuhré se da cuenta de donde estaba Rüveyda y decide tomar cartas en el asunto. Ella termina buscando a Fikret para hacer un trato.

programme.title: El Árbol
programme.desc: Doña Lucha descubre un árbol mágico del que "florecen" hogazas de pan en lugar de frutas. Llevada por la codicia, comienza a vender el pan.

programme.title: La Familia de mi Esposo
programme.desc: La Familia de mi Esposo - El Conflicto De Gunés: Gunés sufre al saber que los Ar son la verdadera familia de Tarik. Hakan sospecha que algo mal ocurre con el bebé que espera con Fulden.

programme.title: La Familia de mi Esposo
programme.desc: La Familia de mi Esposo - Todos Conocen La Verdad: Yuyu habla con Mukadder y le revela la verdad sobre Tarik. Gunés le revela a Tarik su vínculo con los Ar. Zafer descubre la identidad de Tarik.

programme.title: El Secreto de Feriha

programme.title: El Secreto de Feriha

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Chismes: Hacer va de visita al restaurante y pregunta por el contenido de la carta. Resat busca ir a hablar con Fatmagül. Mukaddes está cansada de que la gente hable a sus espaldas.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Prueba: La envidia se ha apoderado de Mukaddes y habla con Perihan. Fatmagül presenta su examen de manejo. Erdogan y Yasar se encuentran. Resat y Perihan se dan cuenta de los planes de Munir.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Viaje: Munir traiciona a su familia. Meltem comienza a rehacer su vida. Kerim y Fatmagül deciden salir de viaje. El plan de Mukaddes no va según lo planeado e intenta engañar a Kadir. Selim vuelve a casa.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Incomodidad: Murat escucha a Mukaddes. La noche de Kerim y Fatmagül se vuelve un poco incómoda tras encontrárse con Christine. Erdgoan y Selim vuelven a encontrarse.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Historia: Rhami y su familia vuelven a Izmir y al negocio de la familia. Fatmagül y Kerim hacen las paces con sus vecinos. Fatmagül cuenta su historia a Sineme, quien escribirá su historia para que el mundo sepa toda la verdad.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Deseos: Los recuerdos de su último cumpleaños, son ahora escenciales para contar su historia a Sineme. Fatmagül recuerda gratamente cómo los deseos de aquel cumpleaños se han vuelto realidad.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Juicio Final: Se inicia el capítulo final del juicio y Fatmagül solo desea cerrar para siempre ese capítulo de su vida.

programme.desc: Raiza le confiesa a Octavio que siente un gran interés por él, Maricruz llega al casino del puerto para ver cómo se maneja el negocio de su padre.

programme.title: Cuando me enamoro: Ella es tu hija

programme.desc: Cristóbal le dice a Victoria que Gasca confesó y que quizás sea condenado a muerte. Mientras tanto, Diego le dice a Juana que mandó matar a Luis, ella se pone muy triste.

programme.title: Alborada
programme.desc: Isabel le dice a Marina que Gasca confesó que él mato a su padre. Por su parte, Felipe le propone a Luis ponerle una trampa a Diego y Antonio pero Cristóbal se opone.

programme.title: Alborada
programme.desc: Luis le pide a Felipe que prepare un testamento dónde le deja todo a Hipólita y Rafael. Andrés le dice a Marina que no quiere que Francisco sea el dueño de la hacienda. Asunción le dice a Juana que Sara de Oviedo será la suegra de Marina.

programme.title: Alborada
programme.desc: Antonio le informa a Hipólita que se irá a un viaje largo. Cristóbal decide que Catalina sea su heredera universal el día que él falte. Modesta le dice a Gasca que un grupo de hombres armados lo va a rescatar.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Alonso enfrenta a Ivana en el funeral de Benita. Rosendo llega al funeral y les declara la guerra a José Miguel e Ivana. Leonor le exige a Ivana que pague una mensualidad por vivir en la hacienda Montesinos.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Rosendo organiza con Zamarripa un plan para raptar a Valentina. Valentina se encuentra con José Miguel y él le anuncia su partida de la hacienda Montesinos. Valentina escucha a Isabel diciéndole a Ivana que sabe que mató a Óscar.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: José Miguel se despide de la gente del pueblo. Valentina le propone a Isabel buscar ayuda psicológica para Ivana. Horacio le avisa a José Miguel que Rosendo raptó a Valentina.

programme.desc: Cynthia le pide a Efraín que la ayude a resolver los problemas de a hacienda para evitar que vaya a la cárcel. Cynthia le pide a Ana Paula que la ayude a reconquistar a Gustavo.

programme.title: Sortilegio: Un pasado por descubrir

programme.title: Abismo de pasión: Viviendo el amor
programme.desc: Elisa y Damián se alegran porque ya son novios. Gael sufre al no poder olvidar a Elisa. Kenia le confiesa a Gael que son hermanos. Augusto tiene en su poder la prueba de la infidelidad de Carmina.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña: Lucha de amor
programme.desc: Crisanta cree que Timo está interesado en Iluminada. Valentina y José Miguel pasan un día de alegría en la feria del pueblo. Leonor le deja en claro a Federico que nunca le dará el divorcio.

programme.title: Imperio de mentiras: Pérdida dolorosa
programme.desc: A causa del atentado que sufrió Majo, ella pierde al bebé que esperaba de Darío. Eugenio no descansará en su venganza hasta terminar con la vida de Leonardo.

programme.title: La usurpadora: Callejón sin salida
programme.desc: Paola le propone a Carlos Daniel que le pida a Luciano que se retracte de sus declaraciones y, a cambio, le dará el divorcio. Sin embargo, al obtener una negativa, lo amenaza con decirle la verdad a sus hijos.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: Le dan trato preferencial a Lucha y hasta un famoso narcotraficante se pone a sus órdenes porque cree que mató a un delincuente. Albertano se corta un mechón por el cual le dan mucho dinero. Lucha se enoja muchísimo al enterarse.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: Albertano le manda a María la llave de su cuarto para que saque sus cosas, pero ella entiende le pide que se mude con él, con su llave tiene una pata de conejo de la buena suerte pero al ensuciarse, María la tira y le compra una pata nueva.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: Doña Lucha aprovecha el corte de agua en la colonia para vender unas cubetas que tenía apartadas. María se pone celosa de la nueva ayudante del equipo de futbol, Citlali, mientras que Albertano se la pasa en la banca por ser mal jugador.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Federica se encuentra con Arsenio, un antiguo novio millonario. Federica de pronto empieza a tener mucho dinero. Ludovico está destrozado por el engaño de Federica.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Régulo hace todo lo posible por no invitar a Ludovico, por su fama, pero los chismosos de la oficina lo echan de cabeza.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Con la reunión de exalumnos de Federica a la vuelta de la esquina, ella se siente algo insegura por su apariencia. Entonces decide hacerse un arriesgado cambio de look.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico se mete en problemas en el trabajo cuando trata de ayudar a Don Camerino en asuntos financieros. Tratando de resolver el desorden, Ludovico complica todo aún más, pero Junior lo ayudará a salir del problema.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico sufre un infarto y muere. Santa Ninel le pide cambiar su forma de ser para antes de Navidad si no quiere morir. Ludovico hace todo por cambiar con su familia.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico habla de su familia: cuando conoció a Federica, cuando se enteró de que iba a ser padre y de otros graciosos momentos que han marcado su vida.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Federica convence a Ludovico de que le contrate una sirvienta. Federica se quiere contratar a una mujer conservadora y gruñona, mientras que Ludovico pretende quedarse con una mujer de buen cuerpo aunque algo torpe.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico y Federica descubren que Martina y Fabio tienen una fiesta y se ofenden por no haberlos invitado. Federica y Ludovico interrumpen la cena de Martina y Fabio con sus nuevos amigos.

programme.title: Los héroes del norte: ¡Sálvese quien pueda!
programme.desc: Cuando su contrato con doña Olegaria está a punto de terminar, aparece Roger de los Santos, empresario que les propone manejarlos. A los héroes les encanta la idea, pero no quieren traicionar a doña Olegaria.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos: El supermercado
programme.desc: Una visita inesperada llega a la casa de doña Cuca para quedarse y el trabajar en un supermercado puede ser la peor idea que Vítor y Albertano pueden tener.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mia tiene un altercado con Sol, por adueñarse de su cuarto Pilar le hace creer a Vico que Giovanni la engaña Franco cree que Mia tuvo relaciones Leonardo intenta que Lola quiera a Lupita la banda RBD se reúne para acordar en dónde ensayarán.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mía se enfurece al ver que Sol coquetea con Miguel. El Sr. Mendiola le avisa a Gandía que está despedido. Lola no acepta hablar con Lupita. Gandía le avisa a Pilar que la sacará del colegio porque ya no podrá pagarlo.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Pascual anuncia su despido de la institución, todos lloran y no saben si decir la verdad para defenderlo ante el comité para que lo perdonen.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mía se enoja al ver llegar a Sol y a su amiga a los ensayos de RBD. El enojo la hizo decidir terminar con el grupo. Llega el nuevo director.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: El nuevo director quiere que se lo respete y que mejor que ponerse contra los alumnos e imponerse cortándole el cabello a Santos, lo que hace que todos lo odien aún más.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mia dona parte de su ropa a los niños pobres, pero el director Font aprovecha su generosidad para quedar bien. Mia descubre que Sol y Miguel provocaron que regalara su ropa nueva. León obliga a Diego a firmar una acusación en contra de su madre.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Lola saluda muy efusiva a Lupita. Font sorprende a Sol insinuándosele al profesor Gonzalo Alicia encuentra en el escritorio de Font fotografías de varias adolescentes Sol golpea a Mia con un balón Sol se enfurece al ver a Mia con Miguel.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta le dice a Mia y a Miguel que le preocupa el futuro de RBD. Hilda y Alicia sospechan que Font no es una persona honesta. Teo le comenta a José que la quiere pero siente que lo asfixia. Tomás le dice a Roger que le enseñará algo de Roberta.

programme.title: Mañana es para siempre
programme.desc: Eduardo idea un plan para evitar que Fernanda sepulte a Soledad en la hacienda. Eduardo descubre que Liliana sabe de su verdadera identidad. Santiago le propone a Aurora vivir en la hacienda.

programme.title: Mañana es para siempre
programme.desc: Bárbara acusa a Eduardo de haberse robado el cadáver de Soledad. Fernanda enfurece al saber que, por culpa de Bárbara, Eduardo se fue de la hacienda.

programme.title: Mañana es para siempre
programme.desc: Eduardo sospecha que Erika en verdad está enamorada de él. Gardenia le pide a Jacinto que la ayude a conseguir trabajo en la hacienda de Eduardo. Bárbara le ordena a Plutarco que se deshaga de Liliana.

programme.title: Mañana es para siempre
programme.desc: Ciro ayuda a Liliana a escapar de la clínica. Fernanda se molesta al saber que la empresa de Gonzalo podría estar en la ruina por culpa de Aníbal. Vladimir le pide a Priscila una oportunidad para poder enamorarla.

programme.title: Porque el amor manda
programme.desc: Una taxista encuentra a Valentina caminando sola en la calle y la lleva a las oficinas de Avon, ahí Alma decide llevarla a su casa. Los matones de Rogelio entran a la vecindad y son golpeados por Chatita, Elías y Jesús.

programme.title: Porque el amor manda
programme.desc: Verónica regaña a Valentina por haberse ido de la casa. Jesús le dice a Delia que reconoció al hombre que lo golpeó. Cárdenas busca una nueva secretaria.

programme.title: Porque el amor manda
programme.desc: Discua Paz de la Soledad es el nombre de la nueva secretaria de Avon. Alma admite frente a Xóchitl que extraña a Jesús en la empresa. Jesús extraña estar cerca de Alma y sonríe al recordar el beso que se dieron.

programme.title: Porque el amor manda
programme.desc: Patricia visita a Jesús en su nuevo trabajo y crea un plan para que él regrese a Avon, Alma se enamore más de él y ella se separe de Rogelio. Verónica habla con Chatita sobre sus sentimientos hacia Jesús.

programme.title: Uno y medio contra el mundo

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | Ultimate BMW barn find, and a family feud over a "secret Chevy"
programme.desc: A Triumph Stag on a dead end road that leads Tom to a treasure trove of forgotten vacation cars hidden in 100-year-old barns. Next, we get the story of a family feud that caused a classic Chevy to be hidden away for decades.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | The real reason Corvettes exist, plus some wild JDM cars
programme.desc: Tom Cotter finds a "baby Corvette," also known as the Opel GT. Next, he comes across in interesting collection of Japanese sports cars.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | Oldsmobiles, Mopars, Pontiacs and Fords!
programme.desc: Tom Cotter finds Oldsmobile barn find heaven (with some Mopars and Pontiacs sprinkled in for good measure). After that, Tom stumbles upon a 1970 Shelby Mustang GT500 buried in a garage, but in amazing condition.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | Jaguar E-Type, 1927 Chrysler, and a GTO parked for 40 years
programme.desc: Tom Cotter comes across an all-original 1967 Jaguar E-Type and wide variety of MGs, along with a 1927 Chrysler 60 that's original down to the door knobs and electrical. Next up, a Pontiac GTO that has been parked for over 40 years.

programme.title: Revelations with Jason Cammisa | Renault R5 Turbo and Saab 900 Turbo
programme.desc: Early turbo cars! In this episode of Revelations, host Jason Cammisa tells us the unique stories behind the Renault R5 Turbo, and the Saab 900 Turbo.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | Lamborghini kit car and basement full of cool cars
programme.desc: Tom Cotter finds some interesting cars in the basement of a large house in a residential neighborhood in Southern Utah. Next, Tom is in Georgia where finds a 1965 Ford Fairlane with a 289 V-8 and 4-speed manual transmission.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | Massive stash of cars in old car dealership
programme.desc: Tom Cotter gets a tour of an enormous "museum" of forgotten cars stashed in a defunct car dealership. Tom's next stop reveals a rare Corvair, a large collection of Mazdas, and a rare "Alfa Jr."

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | Woodie Wagon craftsman and the story of Tom's Woodie
programme.desc: Tom Cotter meets an amazing craftsman who has spent many decades restoring and repairing woodie wagons and is one of the last people left in the world doing such work. After that, we get to hear the wild story behind Tom's Ford woodie wagon.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | The amazing and unusual cars of the Lane Motor Museum
programme.desc: Tom meets up with Jeff Lane to get a private tour of basement collection in the Lane Motor Museum. Next, Tom goes hunting for barn finds near his home in North Carolina.

programme.title: Chip Foose Draws a Car
programme.desc: In this episode, watch as Chip Foose draws his creative take on the legendary Toyota FJ40 Land Cruiser. Next, Chip moves onto another Japanese classic from the same manufacturer, the iconic little sportscar: the Toyota MR2.

programme.desc: In this episode of ICONS, host Jason Cammisa reviews the Toyota GR 86 by comparing it to the Mk8 Volkswagen GTI and ND2 Mazda Miata. Next, Jason compares the the wild hot hatches from Toyota: the GR Corolla and the GR Yaris.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | Will the faded paint on this dusty Ford Wagon shine like new?
programme.desc: Tom Cotter explores a property Midland, Texas, absolutely filled with old cars. An old Ford wagon catches his eye and Tom attempts to cut through the sun-faded, dust-covered quarter panel to reveal its former glory.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: This is story about hope for the future in the face of heartbreaking tragedy, when "Making It Right" takes on a new meaning- completing an unresolved renovation and making it possible for a family to finally begin the healing process after the loss of a loved one. The connection between the emotional health of a family and condition of their home is a strong one. Mike and the team heal a house left in limbo, and make it a home once more.

programme.title: Holmes On Homes
programme.desc: Julie and Joe needed another bedroom in anticipation of adopting a second child. The high-pitched roof on their new suburban home seemed to have a large enough attic space to accommodate an extra room. Their contractor advised them that it was an easy retrofit because exterior walls and roof are not touched. The reality is quite different. In order to utilize the volume inside the attic, the contractor removed the crucial structure that supported the roof, and created a dangerous mess. Mike and the team have no choice but to tear the roof completely off and build the attic space properly.

programme.desc: From the Forbidden City in Beijing, Martin dreams up a true Imperial Banquet. Recipes: Green Onion and Garlic Pancakes, Dry-Fried Mongolian Lamb

programme.title: Martin Yan's China
programme.desc: At a panda research station in the mountains of Sichuan, Martin plays with these national treasures and gets a rare glimpse of a newborn panda cub. Then it's back to Chengdu, stopping on the way at a farmer's restaurant where everything is fresh from the land. Recipes: Panda's Favorite, Mrs.Yan's Weekly Chicken Soup

programme.title: Martin Yan's China
programme.desc: High in the mountains of southern China, Martin visits beautiful Lugu Lake, where women rule the roost. A seven hour drive from the nearest major city, the people of this region are known for their hospitality and, of course, their food. Recipes: Corn Crunch Stir-fry, Five Flavor Chicken

programme.title: Martin Yan's China
programme.desc: Martin has a command performance at the Guangzhou Puppet Theater. Later he takes us to the “old town” that is undergoing renovation and then dines at the ultra-modern “Made In Kitchen” restaurant. Recipes: Canton Curry Crab, Shrimp Tulips

programme.title: Martin Yan's China
programme.desc: Pingyao, an ancient walled city, finds Martin wandering its streets, experiencing the sights. Along the way, he meets a master of the art of paper cutting, enjoys the delicious offerings of a street noodle vendor and checks out the varieties of regional dates. Recipes: Rainbow Stir-fry, Steamed Date Buns

programme.title: Martin Yan's China
programme.desc: Martin visits Chengdu's old spice market to check out the region's renowned fiery chilies. He then experiences local fast food in the modern part of town, samples the many delights while walking around a restored part of town, and finally has his fortune read at a traditional tea house. Recipes: Sichuan Spice Market Fish, Sichuan Glass Noodles

programme.title: Martin Yan's China
programme.desc: Martin checks out the ancient Terra Cotta Warriors of Xian. More important, he discovers the local Mutton soup and then a restaurant offering countless varieties of dumplings before finishing the day in the exotic Muslim Quarter inside the ancient walls of Xian. Recipes: Tea Infused Chicken Kabob, Yin & Ying Vegetable Pockets

programme.title: Martin Yan's China
programme.desc: In Shanghai's ancient LuWan district, Martin is given a tour by a lovely elderly woman who introduces him to the neighborhood. He visits the kitchen of a 130 year-old restaurant, heads outside to sample the famous, juicy Shanghai dumplings and dines at a modern, upscale, western restaurant. Recipe: Dragon and Lion Head Meatball.

programme.title: Martin Yan's China
programme.desc: Martin returns to his childhood home visiting cherished haunts including his mother's tiny kitchen. Then it's off to the countryside to visit his ancestral village and a nearby world heritage site where the Overseas Chinese returned and built architectural marvels. Recipes: Mom's Golden Egg cake, Prosperity Fish

programme.title: Martin Yan's China
programme.desc: Shangri-La really exists in a remote area near Tibet. Martin journeys to this important center of Tibetan culture and religion, meeting up with his friend Bai Ma, who has returned to his home town after a career in Beijing. Recipes: Shangri-La Beef and Broccoli, Ping Pong Diplomacy with guest Chef Tom Douglas

programme.title: Martin Yan's China
programme.desc: Martin explores the sights and tastes of an Old Chonqing pedestrian village. Then he tries two very different versions of the region's traditional fiery hot Sichuan Hot Pot. Recipes: Poached Eggplant in Spicy Peanut Sauce, Sichuan Hot Pot

programme.title: Martin Yan's China
programme.desc: Martin is in Guangdong Province where he visits a knife factory and a black bean factory. Then it's off to explore the regions farms, especially the rice fields and a duck farm. Recipes: Steamed Fish Fillet with Black Bean Sauce, Grandma Yan's Claypot

programme.title: Martin Yan's China
programme.desc: In Shunde, “the Land of Chefs,” Martin visits Chef Tan and his environmentally-friendly fish farm. programme.title: Pepper Spray and Guns
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia douse a couple with a dose of pepper spray when the debtor gets too pushy with Sonia. Next, Matt and Froy battle biker girls when going after a motorcycle. And Finally, Matt and Froy confront a couple of delinquents in attempt to repo the couple's car, but they are soon sent running when the couple pushes back with guns.

programme.title: Monster of a Problem
programme.desc: Lyndah and Matt confront a confused debtor who is as quick with his questions as he is with his knife. Then, Lou and Lyndah interrupt a seaside party to repo a motorboat away from a gaggle of misguided youths. And, Lou, Froy, and Sonia head to the dirt track to repossess a car from an event promoter. They seem to be able to reason with him, but his monster truck-driving brother with no respect for human life may prove to be a problem.

programme.title: Couple of Yups/Bottled Feelings/A Screw Loose
programme.desc: First, Frankie and Lyndah find themselves in a fancy neighborhood, dealing with a pair of uptight yuppies with well-coordinated clothes and well-coordinated attacks. Then Lyndah goes wild when a truck-driving debtor gets physical with Sonia. And finally, Matt and Froy face down a backwoods Texan with secret ammunition.

programme.title: Contact
programme.desc: After recovering their stolen truck, the reunited repo team is on pins and needles to hold their shaky alliance together.

programme.title: Boys with Toys
programme.desc: Matt is eager to work his way onto Sonia's coveted airplane repo, despite her adamancy against him.

programme.title: All the Wrong Moves
programme.desc: Sonia and Froy show off their best moves against a team of dance instructors who will stop at nothing to hold onto their car. Matt and Sonia repossess a vehicle from a woman with the world's most vindictive boyfriend. Lou and Froy match muscle, wits with a gang of vicious roadies.

programme.title: The Rift
programme.desc: A new rift between Matt and the rest of the crew puts the fate of the team in question.

programme.title: The Junior Partner
programme.desc: Now that Lou has accepted Matt's offer to buy into the company, the team is back in action, but there are still some unanswered questions. Sonia, Lyndah, and Froy interrupt a rich kid's brunch party to take away his ride, Matt and Lyndah attempt to repo an unusual vehicle from a man who thinks he's Uncle Sam, and Lou and Matt are in a losing match with an unruly gang of jacked-up rugby players.

programme.title: All In
programme.desc: The team is ahead of schedule on their Vegas mission, but will it all be derailed when Froy brings unwanted trouble back to the office? Also, Ronnie and Froy run into an unexpected dilemma when a husband's better halves take the reins, Carlos and Sonia repo a limo from an arrogant lotto winner whose luck has run out, and Froy and Lou track down an RV as a side repo for a mom and pop shop, unfortunately the repo goes disastrously wrong when the RV explodes and the fire department has to be called.

programme.title: Sugardaddy Shakedown
programme.desc: The team wonders what's up with Sonia as she wrestles with Lou's big secret. Ronnie goes undercover and takes a gold digging RO out on a date, but when Carlos lets the cat out of the bag all hell breaks loose. Matt and Froy struggle with language barriers when an Italian photographer and his assistant resorts to violence because they can't comprehend. Will Sonia finally reveal what's happening, or will carrying her brother's burden get the best of her?

programme.title: The Missing RV and the Private Jet
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy track down an RV that has been missing for 30 years, only to find that its owner is using it to cart around a group of impetuous young Canadian rock stars.

programme.title: The Road to Recovery
programme.desc: On this premiere of Operation Repo's brand new season, Sonia's rehabilitation from her gunshot wound takes a shocking turn. The whole team runs into trouble on a job when they attempt to repossess a carnival ride from a group of wannabe carnies, Froy and Matt wrangle with a gym owner and his hired muscle, and Lou, Froy, and Sonia repo a truck from a protester in quite the revealing outfit.

programme.title: Burgers, Bottles, and Hustlers
programme.desc: Lou and Sonia repo a compact sedan from a trio of gun-wielding, bottle-breaking gangsta gals. Then, Matt and Froy get some fast food when they deal with an irate burger-slinger who won't honor Matt's order for his car. Finally, Sonia and Froy come face-to-face with a small time hustler and a gaggle of ladies in his employ.

programme.title: Raising the Roof
programme.desc: Sonia and Froy deal with an unbalanced debtor who threatens to take down the entire company, while Matt and Ronnie take on children's book vendors who are up to no good.

programme.title: Pickle Man
programme.desc: Facing certain death by ALS, Arthur Cohen decides to leave a legacy of pickles. PickALS, that is. Arthur is brilliant, hilarious and courageous in this intimate portrait of a man facing a brutal disease. Directed by Nastasya Popov.

programme.title: NF Forward: Being Kylie Earl
programme.desc: Kylie suffers from a rare genetic disease called Neurofibromatosis which from birth affected her left eye. She has never been able to see from it, as she got older the plexiform tumors caused her eye to be removed. Against odds Kylie, a bubbly 16yr old is a high performing athlete, a back spotter in the Texas Elite Cheer team. While facing crippling mental blocks and battling low muscle tone because of her condition she preserves in a sport that favors not only physical aesthetics but requires precision, strength and flawless technique.

programme.title: Gotta Groove Records
programme.desc: A short film on the history and resurgence of vinyl records from the perspective of an artist focused pressing plant in Cleveland, Ohio. A hero story about grit, manufacturing and warm tones. Directed by Nick Cavalier.

programme.title: A View From The Window
programme.desc: An immersive glimpse of a school day through the eyes of deaf children. Follow a third grade class at the California School for the Deaf in Fremont as they learn about everything from marine life to police harassment. Directed by Christian Filippone and Azar Kafaei.

programme.title: Hotel 22
programme.desc: Each night in Silicon Valley, a public bus transforms into an unofficial shelter for the homeless. Hotel 22 captures a single, dramatic night on the Line 22 route. Directed by Elizabeth Lo.

programme.title: Lazarus
programme.desc: Lazarus is a short documentary following Lazarus Chigwandali, a street musician with Albinism from Malawi as he teams up with a London-based music producer to record his debut album. Directed by David Darg.

programme.title: Five Star
programme.desc: With 41 full-ride Division 1 scholarship offers, Brandon Jones is one of the most heavily recruited high school football players in the country. Directed by Ryan Booth.

programme.title: How To Make A Rainbow
programme.desc: The story of a young girl and her mother, observed over the course of two years, as they move together through transitions of home, identity and name. Directed by Ryan Maxey.

programme.title: Deprogrammed
programme.desc: DEPROGRAMMED chronicles Ted 'Black Lightning' Patrick's anti-cult crusade. His practice of deprogramming, also known as “reverse brainwashing,” quickly snowballed into a vast underground movement composed of concerned parents, ex-cultists, and sympathetic law-enforcers whose mission was to physically and mentally remove individuals from cults. Some of the people he's saved, however, wonder if his services cause more harm than good. Directed by Mia Donovan.

programme.title: Disaster Playground
programme.desc: Hollywood relies on Bruce Willis to save the world in Armageddon, but who are the real-life heroes seeking to save our civilization from the next major asteroid impact? Disaster Playground investigates future outer space catastrophes and the procedures to manage and assess the risks, following the scientists planning the monitoring and deflection of hazardous Near Earth Objects and the real-life procedures in place in the event of an asteroid collision with the earth. Directed by Nelly Ben Hayoun.

programme.title: Leguizamo Does America: Ep. 1- New York
programme.desc: Though often overlooked, Latinos have been making contributions to the culture of NYC all along. Whether through food, dance, music or fashion, Latinos have helped make this city what it is: A cultural hub that the world looks to for inspiration. John begins his journey in Jackson Heights, Queens, the borough that shaped him as a man and as an artist, where he highlights the Latino spot that helps make every borough feel like home…the Bodega. He then meets up with DJ Tony Touch to discuss the many ways in which Latinos helped build Hip-Hop culture. Later, he visits the Puerto Rican Traveling Theatre to discuss the lack of access Latinos have to Broadway stages. He then shines a light on Luar, a fashion brand created, owned and operated by Raul Lopez, a true kid from the barrio, who unlike so many Latino designers before him is getting the recognition he deserves. John also pays tribute to salsa music and the people who keep it alive throughout the city. Lastly, John hosts one of his “Legends Dinners” with the help of Colombian chef, Stephanie Del Carmen who focuses on cooking and honoring indigenous food. Food that John, comedian Aida Rodriguez, DJ Tony Touch, Fat Joe and Broadway star Sergio Trujillo enjoy while discussing all things Latin.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.sub-title: Heli Platform to Platform Jump, Barber Shop, Container Launch
programme.desc: This episode features four co-ed pairs competing as teams. In the first stunt, both team members leap back and forth between two platforms hanging from helicopters with each person transferring up to 10 flags from one platform to the other and then jumping in the water. The three teams to get highest flag total will advance to the next round. In the second stunt one team member is seated in a barber chair and their partner spins them. When the chair stops, they have to get whichever haircut their head was pointing to. There are six haircuts they can get. Teams would advance to the finals if both members got their designated haircuts. In the finale a crane lifts a large container to 200 feet in the air, both team members have to climb rope ladders hanging from the container. Once they reach the container, they both have to scale a narrow ledge on the side, collect two Allen wrenches, and climb another ladder to the top. Once on top, they have to use the wrenches to unscrew hatches and climb down into the container. When they were both inside, they have to touch two pieces of a live wire together in order to blow themselves out of the container and into the water below. The team to complete this stunt the fastest would be the Fear Factor Champions at winning $50,000. This week competing in the Home Invasion is the Frederickson family of Hagerstown, Maryland.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.sub-title: It's My Way on the Runway
programme.desc: In the Marie Claire Challenge, the designers are once again split off into teams to design a fashion capsule collection for the new magazine Marie Claire at Work. The teams also must direct a fashion shoot for their collection, which is also part of the criteria they are judged on for this challenge.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: In a challenge for L'Oreal, the designers team up with clients whose friends or loved ones are in desperate need of a makeover. The designers must consult and work with their clients to give them a new and flattering look that is also conducive to their lifestyle.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: For the Lord and Taylor Challenge, the designers receive the opportunity to design a look for a capsule collection that celebrates ten seasons of Project Runway. If chosen as the winner, their look would join the ranks of many former Project Runway designers and winners, and it would be manufactured and sold at Lord and Taylor.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: For this challenge, the designers divided into teams of three, and they must raise their own shopping money by selling t-shirts and other designs on the streets of NYC. Once they have raised their money, they have to design a two-piece fall collection, and one look must include a piece of outerwear.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: For the HP Challenge, the designers must create their own textile and design a look that is representative of their heritage. They are surprised when a member of their family comes for a surprise visit and helps them with their inspiration.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.sub-title: I Get a Kick Out of Fashion
programme.desc: The designers are treated to a show at Radio City Music Hall, where they learn that they will be designing an outfit for the world-famous Rockettes to wear in an upcoming performance.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: For Heidi's challenge, the designers arrive at Babies R Us where they learn that they will be designing an outfit for their youngest clients yet—babies! In a twist of fate, they are also made to take care of “real” babies: dolls that cry when they need to be changed, fed, or burped. And if that wasn't enough, Heidi throws another twist at the designers they also must create a complementary look for the baby's mom to wear.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.sub-title: In a Place Far, Far Away
programme.desc: As the designers face their final challenge before Mercedes Benz Fashion Week, they are tasked with their most difficult and creative challenge yet: making an avant-garde look inspired by L'Oreal's new line of makeup called “Electric Fantasie".

programme.title: Atuh Beach: Indonesia
programme.desc: Take a tour of beautiful Indonesian waters, surrounded by impressive rock formations.

programme.title: Natural Beauty
programme.desc: Travel north to fly over Norway's magical fjords, tiny fishing villages, and stunning mountain landscapes.

programme.title: At Dusk
programme.desc: Nothing is more beautiful than the brilliant setting of the sun as it sinks behind the mountains of the Laurentians.

programme.title: At Dusk
programme.desc: Soar into the golden California sunset on the wings of colourful paragliders.

programme.title: Sunny Getaways
programme.desc: Laze the day away on a white sand beach in the Philippines as the sun gently sets on the horizon.

programme.title: South Australia Seas
programme.desc: "South Australian Seas" transports viewers to the remote and gorgeous southern coasts of Australia as captured from above. For one full hour, you'll be gently transported from one vibrant ocean scene to the next paired with real-life ocean sounds and sublimely beautiful ambient music by Relax Moods.

programme.title: Wairere Falls: New Zealand
programme.desc: Discover the breathtaking beauty of a majestic 153-metre waterfall plunging spectacularly over a cliff and onto the boulders below.

programme.title: Autumn Harvest
programme.desc: Autumn Harvest E1 — A captivating art collection that embraces the colors of fall and the cozy ambiance of pumpkin spice. This assortment of artworks celebrates the rich palette of warm hues, including burnt oranges, golden yellows, deep reds, and earthy browns.

programme.title: Halloween Party: Haunted Fiesta
programme.desc: Halloween Party S1E2: Haunted Fiesta — Showcasing intricate sugar skulls and motifs from Mexico, this vibrant collection is a visual tribute to those who have passed. Guitars, horns, and violins paint vivid melodies while sparse earthy shakers and maracas add a layer of dreamy percussion.

programme.title: Pink Warriors II
programme.desc: Pink Warriors S1E2 — Symbolizing hope and solidarity, the artworks serve as a beacon of hope, encouraging viewers to stand together in unity. Uplifting melodies guide us through pop, funk, and disco-infused soft house.

programme.title: Hispanic Artists Now I
programme.desc: Hispanic Artists Now E1 — A colorful journey through time and culture, showcasing the diverse talents of artists with Latin American roots. The artwork is accompanied by mid-tempo tunes with influences that stretch across Reggaeton, Flamenco, Baille, Salsa, and Latin Jazz.

programme.title: Hispanic Artists Now II
programme.desc: Diverse Perspectives: Hispanic Artists Now E2 — From bold murals to evocative photographs, this collection illuminates the rich heritage and unique perspectives of Latin American artists. The melodies are bright, and the instruments feature guitars, keys, horns, synths, bongos, and shakers.

programme.title: Featured Artists: Young & Bold by Bidgala
programme.desc: Emerging artist portfolio curated by Bidgala, a global online art community empowering young creatives.

programme.title: Happy Hour: Oktoberfest
programme.desc: Happy Hour E3: Oktoberfest — Immerse yourself in the lively spirit of Oktoberfest and the camaraderie of happy hour. With a blend of vivid colors and intricate details, this art collection transports you to bustling beer gardens, traditional attire, and clinking glasses.
